mapper.select:
select tsi.*, tst.sens_tp_nm, COALESCE(alarm.alarm_lvl_cd, 'ARM009') as alarm_lvl_cd, COALESCE(alarm.alarm_level_no, 0) as alarm_level_no, alarm.sens_chnl_id as alarm_sens_chnl_id, case when comm.latest_meas_dt is null then '미수신' when comm.err_cnt >= COALESCE(tsi.nonrecv_limit_min, 0) then '미수신' else '수신' end as comm_status from tb_sensor_info tsi left join tb_sensor_type tst on tsi.senstype_no = tst.senstype_no left join lateral ( select mg.sens_chnl_id, mg.alarm_level as alarm_lvl_cd, case mg.alarm_level when 'ARM001' then 1 when 'ARM002' then 2 when 'ARM003' then 3 when 'ARM004' then 4 else 0 end as alarm_level_no from ( select lt.sens_no, lt.sens_chnl_id, lt.reg_dt, case when ( tai."4th_lvl_min" is not null and tai."4th_lvl_max" is not null and ( lt.data_diff <= LEAST(tai."4th_lvl_min", tai."4th_lvl_max") or lt.data_diff >= GREATEST(tai."4th_lvl_min", tai."4th_lvl_max") ) ) then 'ARM004' when ( tai."3rd_lvl_min" is not null and tai."3rd_lvl_max" is not null and ( lt.data_diff <= LEAST(tai."3rd_lvl_min", tai."3rd_lvl_max") or lt.data_diff >= GREATEST(tai."3rd_lvl_min", tai."3rd_lvl_max") ) ) then 'ARM003' when ( tai."2nd_lvl_min" is not null and tai."2nd_lvl_max" is not null and ( lt.data_diff <= LEAST(tai."2nd_lvl_min", tai."2nd_lvl_max") or lt.data_diff >= GREATEST(tai."2nd_lvl_min", tai."2nd_lvl_max") ) ) then 'ARM002' when ( tai."1st_lvl_min" is not null and tai."1st_lvl_max" is not null and ( lt.data_diff <= LEAST(tai."1st_lvl_min", tai."1st_lvl_max") or lt.data_diff >= GREATEST(tai."1st_lvl_min", tai."1st_lvl_max") ) ) then 'ARM001' else 'ARM009' end as alarm_level from ( select distinct on (tmd.sens_no, tmd.sens_chnl_id) tmd.sens_no, tmd.sens_chnl_id, tmd.reg_dt, tmd.data_diff from tb_measure_details tmd where tmd.sens_no = tsi.sens_no and tmd.reg_dt > now() - interval '1 minute' and tmd.data_diff is not null order by tmd.sens_no, tmd.sens_chnl_id, tmd.reg_dt desc ) lt join tb_alarm_info tai on lt.sens_no = tai.sens_no and lt.sens_chnl_id = tai.sens_chnl_id ) mg where mg.alarm_level != 'ARM009' and COALESCE(tsi.alarm_use_yn, 'N') = 'Y' order by case mg.alarm_level when 'ARM004' then 4 when 'ARM003' then 3 when 'ARM002' then 2 when 'ARM001' then 1 else 0 end desc, mg.reg_dt desc limit 1 ) alarm on true
left join lateral ( select max(tmd.meas_dt) as latest_meas_dt, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - max(tmd.meas_dt))) / 60 - 1 as err_cnt from tb_measure_details tmd where tmd.sens_no = tsi.sens_no ) comm on true
where tsi.sens_no in (
select tlim.sens_no from tb_logr_idx_map tlim where logr_no in ( select tli.logr_no from tb_district_info tdi left outer join tb_logger_info tli on tli.district_no = tdi.district_no where tdi.district_no = #{district_no} ) ) and COALESCE(tsi.sens_disp_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' order by tsi.senstype_no, tsi.sens_nm;

select count(*) from tb_sensor_info tsi left join tb_sensor_type tst on tsi.senstype_no = tst.senstype_no where tsi.sens_no in (select tlim.sens_no from tb_logr_idx_map tlim where logr_no in (select tli.logr_no from tb_district_info tdi left outer join tb_logger_info tli on tli.district_no = tdi.district_no where tdi.district_no = #{district_no})) and COALESCE(tsi.sens_disp_yn, 'Y') = 'Y';
select district_no, site_no, district_nm, dist_addr, dist_lon, dist_lat, dist_zoom from tb_district_info order by district_no limit 1
